posts.author: Yashovardhan
posts.text: All things considered, Transrail is still available at a pretty good valuation even after increasing by 30% this month. Disc. Invested

posts.author: hirakroy123
posts.text: Brownfield plant will be completed by June-July. Capacity expansion will definitely give an edge over peers with increase in margin

posts.author: bbbhutra
posts.text: The company announced the completion of its greenfield expansion at the tower manufacturing plant in Butibori, where commercial production has commenced. The company also said that its brownfield expansion projects at tower manufacturing facilities in Deoli, Baroda, and Silvassa have been partially completed. Following these developments, the total installed capacity of the companys tower manufacturing facilities has increased significantly from 84,000 MTPA to 1,72,400 MTPA.
